name: Basic Hardtack
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix flour, salt (if using), sugar (if using), and water until a dough forms.
2. Using hands or a rolling pin, flatten the dough on a floured cloth.
3. Roll the dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch.
4. If desired, score the dough with a knife.
5. Bake on a cookie sheet in an oven set to 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes.
6. Break into pieces as needed.
